controls.control_objective: To ensure be benchmarked to best practices
controls.control_description:
must be
benchmarked to best practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be benchmarked to best practices

controls.control_objective: To ensure have already implemented or may be implementing some of the requirements indicated in the circular
controls.control_description:
NBFCs
may have already implemented or may be implementing some of the requirements indicated in the circular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have already implemented or may be implementing some of the requirements indicated in the circular

controls.control_objective: To ensure place these directions before their board, together with a gap-analysis vis-a-vis the master direction and the proposed action by september 30, 2017
controls.control_description:
NBFCs may place these directions before their Board, together with a gap-analysis vis-a-vis the Master
Direction and the proposed action by September 30, 2017.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place these directions before their board, together with a gap-analysis vis-a-vis the master direction and the proposed action by september 30, 2017

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the master directions by june 30, 2018 and other nbfcs (asset size below ` 500 crore) shall comply by september 30, 2018
controls.control_description:
NBFCs- Systemically Important shall comply with the Master Directions by June 30, 2018 and other
NBFCs (asset size below ` 500 crore) shall comply by September 30, 2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the master directions by june 30, 2018 and other nbfcs (asset size below ` 500 crore) shall comply by september 30, 2018

controls.control_objective: To ensure form the basis of governance framework
controls.control_description:
The basic principles of value delivery, IT Risk Management, IT resource management and performance
management must form the basis of governance framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to form the basis of governance framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow relevant aspects of such prudential governance standards that have found acceptability in the finance industry
controls.control_description:
Given the criticality of the IT, NBFCs may follow relevant aspects of such prudential governance standards
that have found acceptability in the finance industry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow relevant aspects of such prudential governance standards that have found acceptability in the finance industry

controls.control_objective: To ensure to form an it strategy committee
controls.control_description: 1.1 IT Strategy Committee: NBFCs are required to form an IT Strategy Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to to form an it strategy committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an independent director and cio & cto should be a part of the committee
controls.control_description:
The chairman of the
committee shall be an independent director and CIO & CTO should be a part of the committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an independent director and cio & cto should be a part of the committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at an appropriate frequency but not more than six months should elapse between two meetings
controls.control_description:
The IT
Strategy Committee should meet at an appropriate frequency but not more than six months should elapse
between two meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at an appropriate frequency but not more than six months should elapse between two meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure work in partnership with other board committees and senior management to provide input to them
controls.control_description:
The Committee shall work in partnership with other Board committees and Senior
Management to provide input to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to work in partnership with other board committees and senior management to provide input to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the board
controls.control_description: Its deliberations may be placed before the Board.

controls.control_description:
NBFCs may formulate a Board approved IT policy, in line with the objectives of their organisation
comprising the following:
a) An IT organizational structure commensurate with the size, scale and nature of business activities
carried out by the NBFC;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a board approved it policy, in line with the objectives of their organisation comprising the following: a) an it organizational structure co

involving IT strategy, value delivery, risk management and IT resource management.

controls.control_description:
c) To ensure technical competence at senior/middle level management of NBFC, periodic assessment

d) The NBFCs which are currently not using IPv6 platform should migrate to the same as per National
Telecom Policy issued by the Government of India in 2012.

controls.control_description:
NBFCs must have a board approved IS Policy with the following basic tenets:
a) Confidentiality - Ensuring access to sensitive data to authorized users only.

responsibilities relating to system administration, database administration and transaction
processing.

one or few persons for a particular job.

controls.control_description:

interest rates)
which should be documented.

controls.control_description:
d) Personnel Security - A few authorized application owners/users may have intimate knowledge of
financial institution processes and they pose potential threat to systems and data.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to rigorous background check and screening
controls.control_description:
Personnel with privileged access like
system administrator, cyber security personnel, etc should be subject to rigorous background check
and screening.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to rigorous background check and screening

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least two individuals necessary for its completion as this will reduce the risk of error and will ensure reliability of information
controls.control_description:
For each transaction, there must be at least two individuals necessary for its
completion as this will reduce the risk of error and will ensure reliability of information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at least two individuals necessary for its completion as this will reduce the risk of error and will ensure reliability of information

controls.control_objective: To ensure define what constitutes an incident
controls.control_description: g) Incident Management - The IS Policy should define what constitutes an incident.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to define what constitutes an incident

controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall
develop and implement processes for preventing, detecting, analysing and responding to information
security incidents.

controls.control_description:

including regulatory and legal requirements, facilitating audit, serving as forensic evidence when
required and assisting in dispute resolution.

controls.control_description:
If an employee, for instance, attempts to access an
unauthorized section, this improper activity should be recorded in the audit trail.

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a cyber-security policy elucidating the strategy containing an appropriate approach to combat cyber threats given the level of complexity
controls.control_description:
3.2 Cyber Security
Need for a Board approved Cyber-security Policy
NBFCs should put in place a cyber-security policy elucidating the strategy containing an appropriate
approach to combat cyber threats given the level of complexity of business and acceptable levels of risk,
duly approved by their Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a cyber-security policy elucidating the strategy containing an appropriate approach to combat cyber threats given the level of complexity

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the organisational arrangements so that the security concerns are appreciated, receive adequate attention and get escalated to appropriate leve
controls.control_description:
NBFCs should review the organisational arrangements so that the security
concerns are appreciated, receive adequate attention and get escalated to appropriate levels in the
hierarchy to enable quick action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the organisational arrangements so that the security concerns are appreciated, receive adequate attention and get escalated to appropriate leve

controls.control_objective: To ensure devise a strategy for managing and eliminating vulnerabilities and such strategy may clearly be communicated in the cyber security policy
controls.control_description:
NBFCs may devise a strategy for managing and eliminating vulnerabilities and such strategy may clearly be
communicated in the Cyber Security policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to devise a strategy for managing and eliminating vulnerabilities and such strategy may clearly be communicated in the cyber security policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed and measured through development of indicators to assess the level of risk/preparedness
controls.control_description:
3.4 Cyber security preparedness indicators
The adequacy of and adherence to cyber resilience framework should be assessed and measured through
development of indicators to assess the level of risk/preparedness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed and measured through development of indicators to assess the level of risk/preparedness

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for comprehensive testing through independent compliance checks and audits carried out by qualified and competent professionals
controls.control_description:

comprehensive testing through independent compliance checks and audits carried out by qualified and
competent professionals.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also form a part of this assessment
controls.control_description:
The awareness among the stakeholders including employees may also form a part

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately evolved and should be a part of the overall board approved strategy
controls.control_description:

A Cyber Crisis Management Plan (CCMP) should be immediately evolved and should be a part of the
overall Board approved strategy.

controls.control_objective: To ensure address the following four aspects: (i) detection (ii) response (iii) recovery and (iv) containment
controls.control_description:
CCMP should address the following four aspects: (i) Detection (ii)
Response (iii) Recovery and (iv) Containment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address the following four aspects: (i) detection (ii) response (iii) recovery and (iv) containment

measures in addressing various types of cyber threats including, but not limited to, denial of service,
distributed denial of services (DDoS), ransom-ware / crypto ware, destructive malware, business email

frauds including spam, email phishing, spear phishing, whaling, vishing frauds, drive-by downloads, browser
gateway fraud, ghost administrator exploits, identity frauds, memory update frauds, password related frauds,
etc.

NBFCs are required to report all types of unusual security incidents as specified in point No.

controls.control_description:

It should be realized that managing cyber risk requires the commitment of the entire organization to create a
cyber-safe environment.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be organized
controls.control_description:
Top
Management and Board should also have a fair degree of awareness of the fine nuances of the threats and
appropriate familiarisation may be organized.

vendors, service providers and other relevant stakeholders an understanding of their cyber resilience

testing.

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider use of digital signatures to protect the authenticity and integrity of important electronic documents and also for high value fund transfer

NBFCs may consider use of Digital signatures to protect the authenticity and integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a comprehensive risk assessment of their it systems at least on a yearly basis

3.9 IT Risk Assessment
NBFCs should undertake a comprehensive risk assessment of their IT systems at least on a yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a comprehensive risk assessment of their it systems at least on a yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an analysis on the threats and vulnerabilities to the information technology assets of the nbfc and its existing security controls and processes
controls.control_description:
The assessment should make an analysis on the threats and vulnerabilities to the information technology
assets of the NBFC and its existing security controls and processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an analysis on the threats and vulnerabilities to the information technology assets of the nbfc and its existing security controls and processes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be to find out the risks present and to determine the appropriate level of controls necessary for appropriate mitigation of risks
controls.control_description:
The outcome of the exercise should be
to find out the risks present and to determine the appropriate level of controls necessary for appropriate
mitigation of risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to find out the risks present and to determine the appropriate level of controls necessary for appropriate mitigation of risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought to the notice of the chief risk officer (cro), cio and the board of the nbfc and should serve as an input for information security auditors
controls.control_description:
The risk assessment should be brought to the notice of the Chief Risk Officer (CRO), CIO
and the Board of the NBFC and should serve as an input for Information Security auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought to the notice of the chief risk officer (cro), cio and the board of the nbfc and should serve as an input for information security auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a mechanism for safeguarding information assets that are used by mobile applications to provide services to customers
controls.control_description:
3.10 Mobile Financial Services
NBFCs that are already using or intending to use Mobile Financial Services should develop a mechanism for
safeguarding information assets that are used by mobile applications to provide services to customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop a mechanism for safeguarding information assets that are used by mobile applications to provide services to customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure confidentiality, integrity, authenticity and must provide for end-to end encryption
controls.control_description:
The
Page 8 of 15
technology used for mobile services should ensure confidentiality, integrity, authenticity and must provide for
end-to end encryption.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be well equipped in handling social media risks and threats
controls.control_description:
3.11 Social Media Risks
NBFCs using Social Media to market their products should be well equipped in handling social media risks
and threats.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be well equipped in handling social media risks and threats

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prevalent to mitigate such risks
controls.control_description:
As Social Media is vulnerable to account takeovers and malware distribution, proper controls,
such as encryption and secure connections, should be prevalent to mitigate such risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prevalent to mitigate such risks

updated keeping in view changes in information technology system, threats/vulnerabilities and/or the
information security framework.

IT OPERATIONS
4 IT Operations should support processing and storage of information, such that the required information is

controls.control_description:
NBFCs should identify system deficiencies and
defects at the system design, development and testing phases.

controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure to realign their it systems on a regular basis in line with the changing needs of its customers and business
controls.control_description:
4.2 NBFCs are required to realign their IT systems on a regular basis in line with the changing needs of its
customers and business.

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop, with the approval of their board, a change management policy that encompasses the following: a) prioritizing and responding to change proposa
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, NBFCs should
develop, with the approval of their Board, a Change Management Policy that encompasses the following:
a) prioritizing and responding to change proposals from business,
b) cost benefit analysis of the changes proposed,
c) assessing risks associated with the changes proposed,
d) change implementation, monitoring and reporting.

controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be the responsibility of the senior management to ensure that the change management policy is being followed on an ongoing basis

The IT function of an NBFC should support a robust and comprehensive Management Information System
(MIS) in respect of various business functions as per the needs of the business.

A good MIS should take

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequately skilled personnel in audit committee who can understand the results of the is audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover effectiveness of policy and oversight of it systems, evaluating adequacy of processes and internal controls, recommend corrective action to addr
controls.control_description:
5.2 Coverage: IS Audit should cover effectiveness of policy and oversight of IT systems, evaluating
adequacy of processes and internal controls, recommend corrective action to address deficiencies and
follow-up.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to cover effectiveness of policy and oversight of it systems, evaluating adequacy of processes and internal controls, recommend corrective action to addr

controls.control_objective: To ensure also evaluate the effectiveness of business continuity planning, disaster recovery set up and ensure that bcp is effectively implemented in the organi
controls.control_description:
IS Audit should also evaluate the effectiveness of business continuity planning, disaster recovery
set up and ensure that BCP is effectively implemented in the organization.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also evaluate the effectiveness of business continuity planning, disaster recovery set up and ensure that bcp is effectively implemented in the organi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given to compliance of all the applicable legal and statutory requirements
controls.control_description:
During the process of IS Audit,
due importance shall be given to compliance of all the applicable legal and statutory requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given to compliance of all the applicable legal and statutory requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted by an internal team of the nbfc
controls.control_description: 5.3 Personnel - IS Audit may be conducted by an internal team of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted by an internal team of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint an outside agency having enough expertise in area of it/is audit for the purpose
controls.control_description:
In case of inadequate internal
skills, NBFCs may appoint an outside agency having enough expertise in area of IT/IS audit for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint an outside agency having enough expertise in area of it/is audit for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a right mix of skills and understanding of legal and regulatory requirements so as to assess the efficacy of the framework vis-à-vis these standard
controls.control_description:
There should be a right mix of skills and understanding of legal and regulatory requirements so as to
assess the efficacy of the framework vis-à-vis these standards.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a right mix of skills and understanding of legal and regulatory requirements so as to assess the efficacy of the framework vis-à-vis these standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure act independently of nbfcs' management both in attitude and appearance
controls.control_description:
IS Auditors should act independently of
NBFCs' Management both in attitude and appearance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act independently of nbfcs' management both in attitude and appearance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be properly addressed
controls.control_description:
In case of engagement of external professional
service providers, independence and accountability issues may be properly addressed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be properly addressed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at least once in a year
controls.control_description:
5.4 Periodicity - The periodicity of IS audit should ideally be based on the size and operations of the NBFC
but may be conducted at least once in a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted at least once in a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken preferably prior to the statutory page 11 of 15 audit so that is audit reports are available to the statutory auditors well in time for examination and for incorporating comments
controls.control_description:
IS Audit should be undertaken preferably prior to the statutory
Page 11 of 15
audit so that IS audit reports are available to the statutory auditors well in time for examination and for
incorporating comments, if any, in the audit reports.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken preferably prior to the statutory page 11 of 15 audit so that is audit reports are available to the statutory auditors well in time for examination and for incorporating comments

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly prescribe the reporting framework, whether to the board or a committee of the board viz
controls.control_description:
5.5 Reporting - The framework should clearly prescribe the reporting framework, whether to the Board or
a Committee of the Board viz.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to clearly prescribe the reporting framework, whether to the board or a committee of the board viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly delineated in the framework
controls.control_description:
Responsibilities for
compliance/sustenance of compliance, reporting lines, timelines for submission of compliance, authority for
accepting compliance should be clearly delineated in the framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be clearly delineated in the framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for an audit-mode access for auditors/ inspecting/ regulatory authorities
controls.control_description:
The framework may provide for an
audit-mode access for auditors/ inspecting/ regulatory authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for an audit-mode access for auditors/ inspecting/ regulatory authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a proper mix of manual techniques and caats for conducting is audit
controls.control_description:
5.7 Computer-Assisted Audit Techniques (CAATs): NBFCs shall adopt a proper mix of manual
techniques and CAATs for conducting IS Audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a proper mix of manual techniques and caats for conducting is audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used in critical areas (such as detection of revenue leakage, treasury functions, assessing impact of control weaknesses, monitoring customer trans
controls.control_description:
CAATs may be used in critical areas (such as detection of
revenue leakage, treasury functions, assessing impact of control weaknesses, monitoring customer
transactions under AML requirements and generally in areas where a large volume of transactions are
reported) particularly for critical functions or processes having financial/regulatory/legal implications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used in critical areas (such as detection of revenue leakage, treasury functions, assessing impact of control weaknesses, monitoring customer trans

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designed to minimise the operational, financial, legal, reputational and other material consequences arising from a disaster
controls.control_description:
BCP shall be designed to minimise the operational, financial, legal, reputational and
other material consequences arising from a disaster.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designed to minimise the operational, financial, legal, reputational and other material consequences arising from a disaster

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a board approved bcp policy
controls.control_description: NBFC should adopt a Board approved BCP Policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adopt a board approved bcp policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be monitored by the board by way of periodic reports
controls.control_description: The functioning of BCP shall be monitored by the Board by way of periodic reports.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be monitored by the board by way of periodic reports

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for formulation, review and monitoring of bcp to ensure continued effectiveness
controls.control_description:
The CIO shall be
responsible for formulation, review and monitoring of BCP to ensure continued effectiveness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for formulation, review and monitoring of bcp to ensure continued effectiveness

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the following salient features:
controls.control_description:
The BCP may
have the following salient features:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the following salient features:

controls.control_objective: To ensure first identify critical business verticals, locations and shared resources to come up with the detailed business impact analysis
controls.control_description:
6.1 Business Impact Analysis- NBFCs shall first identify critical business verticals, locations and shared
resources to come up with the detailed Business Impact Analysis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to first identify critical business verticals, locations and shared resources to come up with the detailed business impact analysis

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly list the business impact areas in order of priority
controls.control_description:
The entity shall clearly list the
business impact areas in order of priority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly list the business impact areas in order of priority

controls.control_objective: To ensure try to fully understand the vulnerabilities associated with interrelationships between various systems, departments and business processes
controls.control_description:
6.2 Recovery strategy/ Contingency Plan- NBFCs shall try to fully understand the vulnerabilities
associated with interrelationships between various systems, departments and business processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to try to fully understand the vulnerabilities associated with interrelationships between various systems, departments and business processes

controls.control_objective: To ensure come up with the probabilities of various failure scenarios
controls.control_description:
The BCP
Page 12 of 15
should come up with the probabilities of various failure scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come up with the probabilities of various failure scenarios

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done for recovery and the most cost-effective, practical strategy should be selected to minimize losses in case of a disaster
controls.control_description:
Evaluation of various options should be
done for recovery and the most cost-effective, practical strategy should be selected to minimize losses in
case of a disaster.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be done for recovery and the most cost-effective, practical strategy should be selected to minimize losses in case of a disaster

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the need to put in place necessary backup sites for their critical business systems and data centers
controls.control_description:
6.3 NBFCs shall consider the need to put in place necessary backup sites for their critical business systems
and Data centers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the need to put in place necessary backup sites for their critical business systems and data centers

controls.control_objective: To ensure test the bcp either annually or when significant it or business changes take place to determine if the entity could be recovered to an acceptable leve
controls.control_description:
6.4 NBFCs shall test the BCP either annually or when significant IT or business changes take place to
determine if the entity could be recovered to an acceptable level of business within the timeframe stated in
the contingency plan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to test the bcp either annually or when significant it or business changes take place to determine if the entity could be recovered to an acceptable leve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on 'worst case scenarios'
controls.control_description: The test should be based on 'worst case scenarios'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on 'worst case scenarios'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the cio and the board
controls.control_description:
The results along with the gap
analysis may be placed before the CIO and the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the cio and the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure form the basis for construction of the updated bcp
controls.control_description:
The GAP Analysis along with Board's insight should
form the basis for construction of the updated BCP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form the basis for construction of the updated bcp

controls.control_objective: To ensure take place
controls.control_description:
However, prior to commencement of any outsourcing arrangement, careful
consideration of risks, threats of contractual arrangements and regulatory compliance obligations must take
place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take place

controls.control_description:
The NBFC's decision to
outsource IT Services should fit into the institution's overall strategic plan and corporate objectives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fit into the institution's overall strategic plan and corporate objectives

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by nbfc's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability
controls.control_description:
7.1 The terms and conditions governing the contract between the NBFC and the Outsourcing service
provider should be carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by NBFC's legal counsel on their legal
effect and enforceability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by nbfc's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the following provisions
controls.control_description: The contractual agreement may have the following provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the following provisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have adequate systems and procedures in place to ensure protection of data/application outsourced
controls.control_description:
Outsourcing
service provider should have adequate systems and procedures in place to ensure protection of
data/application outsourced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequate systems and procedures in place to ensure protection of data/application outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retained and accessible to the nbfc based on approved requests
controls.control_description:
For technology outsourcing, requisite
audit trails and logs for administrative activities should be retained and accessible to the NBFC
based on approved requests.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retained and accessible to the nbfc based on approved requests

controls.control_objective: To ensure include clauses to allow the reserve bank of india or persons authorized by it to access the nbfc's documents, records of transactions, and other nece
controls.control_description:
The contractual agreement may include clauses to allow the Reserve Bank of India or persons
authorized by it to access the NBFC's documents, records of transactions, and other
necessary information given to, stored or processed by the service provider within a reasonable
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include clauses to allow the reserve bank of india or persons authorized by it to access the nbfc's documents, records of transactions, and other nece

controls.control_objective: To ensure include a) instituting an appropriate governance mechanism for outsourced processes, comprising of risk based policies and procedures, to effectively
controls.control_description:
7.3 The Role of IT Strategy committee in respect of outsourced operations shall include
a) Instituting an appropriate governance mechanism for outsourced processes, comprising of risk
based policies and procedures, to effectively identify, measure, monitor and control risks associated
with outsourcing in an end to end manner;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include a) instituting an appropriate governance mechanism for outsourced processes, comprising of risk based policies and procedures, to effectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their business continuity preparedness is not adversely compromised on account of outsourcing
controls.control_description:
j) NBFC should ensure that their business continuity preparedness is not adversely compromised on
account of outsourcing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their business continuity preparedness is not adversely compromised on account of outsourcing

controls.control_objective: To ensure start with developing basic it systems mainly for maintaining the database
controls.control_description:
It is recommended that smaller NBFCs may start with developing basic IT systems mainly for
maintaining the database.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to start with developing basic it systems mainly for maintaining the database

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved information technology policy/information system policy
controls.control_description:
NBFCs having asset size below ` 500 crore shall have a Board approved
Information Technology policy/Information system policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved information technology policy/information system policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by september 30, 2018
controls.control_description:
This policy may be designed considering the
undermentioned basic standards and the same shall be put in place by September 30, 2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by september 30, 2018

controls.control_objective: To ensure be progressively scaled up as the size and complexity of nbfc's operations increases
controls.control_description:
8.1 IT Systems should be progressively scaled up as the size and complexity of NBFC's operations
increases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be progressively scaled up as the size and complexity of nbfc's operations increases
